```python
# We are going to unmask, enable, and start the auditd service to remediate the finding.
run_cmd(["systemctl", "unmask", "auditd.service"])
run_cmd(["systemctl", "enable", "auditd.service"])
run_cmd(["systemctl", "start", "auditd.service"])

# Return the tool calls we made
[
    ("run_cmd", ["systemctl", "unmask", "auditd.service"]),
    ("run_cmd", ["systemctl", "enable", "auditd.service"]),
    ("run_cmd", ["systemctl", "start", "auditd.service"])
]
```
